title: Controlify Global Defaults
description: Global Controller Defaults Template for Controlify
body:
# Controlify Global Controller Defaults

A resource pack that provides customizable global default controller bindings for [Controlify](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify).

## Usage

1. Enable this resource pack
2. Edit `assets/controlify/controllers/default_bind/default.json` to customize bindings
3. Reload resource packs (F3 + T)

## Documentation

**[Setup Instructions](https://moddedmc.wiki/en/project/controlify/latest/docs/resource-packs/default-binds)**

---

Requires [Controlify](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify) mod to function.
